title: Ashdale Q4 audit: draft rules of engagement
body: Scope out the Ashdale Technologies Q4 security audit with Marcus Cole and draft the rules-of-engagement doc before the Oct 22 kickoff.

title: Stonewick pentest: automate Nessus credentialed scan policy
body: Automate the Nessus credentialed scan setup for the Stonewick Financial external pentest so the scan policy is reusable each annual engagement.

title: Recon: subdomain enumeration and asset-discovery script
body: Build a subdomain enumeration and asset-discovery recon script that feeds live hosts straight into the Stonewick engagement worklist.

title: Greenleaf HIPAA: document access-control findings
body: Write up the Greenleaf HIPAA retainer findings from the access-control review and map each gap to the relevant safeguard citation.

title: Burp extension: auto-tag authenticated requests for IDOR triage
body: Extend the Burp Suite extension to auto-tag requests hitting authenticated endpoints so I can triage IDOR candidates faster during engagements.

title: AmandaXO beat-tagger: write BPM/key into WAV tags
body: Refactor the AmandaXO beat-tagging tool so it writes BPM and key metadata into the WAV tags instead of a sidecar file.

title: Brightmoor SOC 2: Metasploit post-exploitation resource script
body: Wire up a Metasploit resource script to run the post-exploitation checklist for the Brightmoor SaaS SOC 2 engagement automatically.

title: Threat intel: normalize IOC feeds into a queryable store
body: Pull the daily threat-intel feeds into a normalized IOC store so I can cross-reference indicators against client scan results.

title: DistroKid release automation for 'Lagos Sunset' single
body: Build the DistroKid release automation that stages the Lagos Sunset single with artwork and ISRC ahead of the Nov 13 drop.

title: CVE write-up: deserialization flaw on Stonewick internal app
body: Write up a CVE analysis for the deserialization flaw found on the Stonewick internal app, with a minimal PoC and remediation steps.

title: Stems backup: nightly encrypted cloud sync script
body: Add a scheduled stems backup script that syncs the Ableton project stems to encrypted cloud storage nightly.

title: Sample-library organizer: dedupe and re-catalog by key
body: Build the sample-library organizer to dedupe and re-catalog the afrobeats sample packs by instrument and key.

title: CTF tooling: resilient flag-submission helper
body: Improve the CTF tooling flag-submission helper so it retries and logs solves during ShadowCon; needs review before the Atlanta event.

title: Nessus-to-report pipeline for Ashdale findings
body: Automate the Nessus-to-report pipeline that converts raw scan exports into the Ashdale client-facing findings template.

title: Greenleaf: fix Burp session-token refresh macro
body: Harden the Burp macro that handles the Greenleaf session-token refresh so authenticated scans stop dropping mid-run.

title: Enrich Brightmoor findings with KEV context
body: Add a threat-intel enrichment step that annotates each Brightmoor finding with known-exploited-vulnerability context.

title: Scanner: TLS config fingerprinting and weak-cipher flags
body: Package the custom port-scanning wrapper that fingerprints TLS configs and flags weak ciphers across a client's external range.

title: Beat-tagger: handle diacritics in filenames
body: Fix the AmandaXO beat-tagger crash when a filename contains Igbo diacritics before re-cataloging the Enugu Nights sessions.

title: Metasploit module: chained privilege-escalation checks
body: Finalize the Metasploit automation module that chains the Brightmoor privilege-escalation checks for the SOC 2 Type II evidence set.

title: Threat intel: ingest and dedupe new IOC feed
body: Ingest the new open-source threat-intel feed and dedupe indicators against the existing IOC store before it goes into daily recon.
